title: Israel’s Killing of Ali Larijani Could Allow Military to Tighten Grip on Iran
summary_full: As Iran’s top national security official, Mr. Larijani had a reputation for acting as a bridge between hard-line figures in the armed forces and more moderate political factions.
summary_public: As Iran’s top national security official, Mr. Larijani had a reputation for acting as a bridge between hard-line figures in the armed forces and more moderate political factions.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Killing of Ali Larijani Could Allow Military to Tighten Grip on Iran
